details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that meets all rubric requirements. The ImageTextToTextPipeline class is properly defined with async _call method that accepts images and text prompts. It correctly imports and registers AutoModelForImageTextToText, calls model.generate(), handles both pixel_values and text inputs, and returns generated_text in the expected format. The SUPPORTED_TASKS mapping is properly configured with type 'multimodal'. JSDoc documentation is comprehensive with proper @typedef blocks and usage examples. The implementation follows existing pipeline patterns (batching logic, processor/tokenizer usage, return structure). No existing code is modified. Minor deduction (0.05) due to lack of visible error handling or edge case validation (e.g., when processor or tokenizer are unavailable), though this may be handled at a higher level.
